name: Glade Starfield Glades Render v3
description: Full-frame snowfield with huge side-pass hardwood trees and first-person storm speed
code: var ctx=drawingContext,w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height;var g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,h);g.addColorStop(0,'#07091c');g.addColorStop(0.34,'#160f3a');g.addColorStop(1,'#071722');ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);var centerX=w*0.5,centerY=h*0.40;var haze=ctx.createRadialGradient(centerX,centerY,0,centerX,centerY,h);haze.addColorStop(0,'rgba(118,78,255,0.18)');haze.addColorStop(0.34,'rgba(42,220,255,0.09)');haze.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');ctx.fillStyle=haze;ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);var trees=state.trees||[];for(var t=0;t<trees.length;t++){var tr=trees[t];var py=h*0.08+tr.y*(h*1.04);var depth=0.45+tr.y*2.25;var spread=(0.30+tr.lane*0.58)*w*depth;var px=centerX+tr.side*spread;var trunkH=h*(tr.h*1.95)*depth;var trunkW=Math.max(2.6,5.2*depth);var neon=tr.side<0?'rgba(65,245,255,0.22)':'rgba(238,95,255,0.20)';ctx.fillStyle='rgba(6,18,24,0.94)';ctx.fillRect(px-trunkW*0.5,py-trunkH,trunkW,trunkH);ctx.strokeStyle=neon;ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(0.8,1.6*depth);ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(px,py-trunkH);ctx.lineTo(px,py);ctx.stroke();for(var b=0;b<6;b++){var by=py-trunkH*(0.16+b*0.12);var bl=(12+b*7)*depth;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(px,by);ctx.lineTo(px+tr.side*bl,by-6*depth);ctx.moveTo(px,by+2*depth);ctx.lineTo(px-tr.side*bl*0.8,by-4*depth);ctx.stroke();}}var flakes=state.flakes||[];ctx.save();ctx.globalCompositeOperation='lighter';for(var i=0;i<flakes.length;i++){var f=flakes[i];var persp=1.0/Math.max(0.05,f.z);var sx=f.x*w+Math.sin((f.y+state.runT)*7+f.tw)*(1.8+persp*0.8);var sy=f.y*h;if(sx<-30||sx>w+30||sy<-30||sy>h+30)continue;var len=Math.min(38,2+persp*6.8);var wid=Math.min(5.2,0.45+persp*0.95);var hue=(i%2===0)?192:302;var a=Math.min(0.98,0.12+persp*0.10);ctx.strokeStyle='hsla('+hue+',100%,80%,'+a.toFixed(3)+')';ctx.lineWidth=wid;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(sx,sy);ctx.lineTo(sx+(f.vx*120),sy+len);ctx.stroke();}ctx.restore();for(var k=0;k<28;k++){var left=(k%2===0);var x0=left?(5+(k%7)*5):(w-5-(k%7)*5);var y0=(k/27)*h;ctx.strokeStyle=left?'rgba(65,245,255,0.10)':'rgba(235,90,255,0.10)';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x0,y0);ctx.lineTo(left?x0+20:x0-20,y0+16);ctx.stroke();}
